case_title: A-L FINANCIAL CORP. VS. DORA T. UIAGALELEI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $35.00) SERVED JAN-19-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHERYL LEWIS, BRANCH MANAGER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED AS PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN BACK THEIR SET OF EXHIBITS FOR EVIDENCE. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $46.20 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00, BALANCE DUE ON REPOSSESSED AUTO AFTER DEFENDANT DEFAULTED ON LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,487.67 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 5/7/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT UIAGALELEI, DORA T.
